creator: crazyalexnt@inbox.ru
text:
I checked the situation on the laptop Dell Inspirion 510m, built-in video based on the Intel 855GME.
After the upgrade to Xorg 7.4 -> 7.5 when starting X - a black screen and the system freezes.
I think that these problems arose because of the new driver xf86-video-intel because of the patches
or a programming error.

Please check the situation closely, because no driver creates a big problem in the work at the moment.
If required I am ready to test patches on the Dell 540m.
